title: cyperus retrofractus var. hystricinus
intro: Cyperus retrofractus var. hystricinus, also known as the woolly flat sedge, is a plant species in the sedge family, Cyperaceae. The plant is traditionally used in East Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus retrofractus var. hystricinus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce blood sugar levels, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
